source_pr.title: ddl: speed up add index by split handle range from pd region.
source_pr.body:
~~@ciscoxll will benchmark this pr with random handle, so don't merge it before he posts the reports.~~ DONE

@zimulala @coocood @shenli This PR now is ready to be reviewed.

I'll remove addTableIndex function and the corresponding data structure in another PR later.

This PR fix #5192.

symptoms: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The PR title/body and .patch are primarily about DDL performance/correctness changes. The provided symptom (race-detector runtime note) does not clearly map to a targeted flaky-test stabilization fix, so we avoid guessing the root cause category.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
